description: T6 inter-rater reliability: automated scorer vs. manual human classification

n20_expert.methodology: Stratified sample, expert manual read of full response

n70_combined.note: Individual annotations for the 50-sample extension are documented in T6_VALIDATION.md summary; structured JSONL covers the 20-sample subset only

key_finding: Primary scorer weakness is over-classifying as ambiguous, not misclassifying walk<->drive. Binary kappa (0.875) confirms directional patterns are robust.
